Common.announcementSub: Start treating your audience like a business.
Common.stopGuessingDesc: Join hundreds of professional creators using Infloura to forecast revenue, land bigger brand deals, and scale their audience.
Common.relatedDescription: Explore more free creator tools to estimate earnings across different platforms and revenue streams.

Announcement.text: Infloura 1.0 is live! Start treating your audience like a business.

Landing.heroTitle2: Simulate how much you can earn
Landing.featuresSub: Stop relying on hope. Start treating your audience like the business it is.
Landing.feat1Desc: See your income potential with mathematical precision across YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and X.
Landing.feat2Desc: Get a month-by-month roadmap from an AI model trained on creator economics and growth tactics.
Landing.feat3Desc: Compare your planned projections vs reality, stay on course, and adjust your actions instantly.
Landing.how1Desc: No API connections required initially. Just drop your current reach and engagement.
Landing.how2Desc: Our deterministic math engine creates 12-month projections tailored to your niche.
Landing.how3Desc: Execute the exact month-by-month steps the AI prescribes to hit your numbers.
Landing.faq1A: No. Infloura is a business simulation tool that relies on standard industry conversion metrics to show you what is mathematically possible. It requires enormous effort on your end.
Landing.faq2A: Currently, we support detailed simulations for YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and X (Twitter).
Landing.faq3A: They are based on industry benchmarks for conversion rates, standard RPMs, and average sponsorship deals. While accurate structurally, individual performance will always vary.
Landing.heroDesc: Crafting exceptional digital experiences through innovative design and cutting-edge technology.
Landing.wallSub: See what ambitious creators are saying about their Infloura experience.
Landing.faq4A: Yes, instantly from your dashboard settings. No questions asked.
Landing.socialProofText: Used by creators exploring their revenue potential
Landing.quickEstimateDesc: Enter your monthly views to see an instant revenue estimation based on industry averages.
Landing.examplesDesc: See how different niches impact your earning potential. Your niche is often more important than your subscriber count.

Dashboard.upgradeToPro: Upgrade to Pro to unlock advanced AI insights.
Dashboard.insightEfficiencyLow: Your estimated RPM is lower than the average creator in your niche.
Dashboard.insightEfficiencyHigh: Your revenue efficiency is above average. Keep optimizing your high-paying content.
Dashboard.insightEfficiencySuggest: Try targeting higher CPM topics like finance, tech, or business.
Dashboard.insightGrowthHigh: Excellent growth this month! Your velocity is sustainable.
Dashboard.insightGrowthLow: Growth is steady, but there is room to accelerate your distribution.
Dashboard.insightGrowthSuggest: Experiment with shorter-form content to drive discovery.

Simulator.title: Revenue Simulator
Simulator.desc: Calculate your future revenue across three growth scenarios based on mathematical projections.
Simulator.emptyState: Fill out the form and run a simulation to see your mathematical revenue projections.
Simulator.toastLimitDesc: Showing 3 months. Upgrade to Pro for 12 months projections.

Pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
Pricing.sub: Invest in your creator business today.
Pricing.proSub: For ambitious creators who treat their audience like a business.

Guides.title: Creator
Guides.description: No fluff. Just actionable, data-driven guides to help you monetize your audience, secure brand deals, and treat your content like a startup.

youtubeSponsor.title: How to Get Your First YouTube Sponsor (Even with Under 10k Subs)
youtubeSponsor.description: Stop waiting for brands to come to you. Learn the exact cold-email templates and engagement metrics you need to secure your first paid brand deal.

instagramEngagement.title: Instagram Engagement Rate: What is a "Good" Score in 2026?
instagramEngagement.description: Likes are down across the board. Decode the new Instagram algorithm, calculate your true engagement rate, and learn how to position it to sponsors.

tiktokMediaKit.title: The Perfect TikTok Media Kit Template for Creators
tiktokMediaKit.description: A step-by-step guide to building a one-page media kit that actually converts inbound brand inquiries into high-paying, long-term sponsorships.

Creators.title: Creator
Creators.description: We reverse-engineered the creator economy. Discover the estimated ad revenue, sponsorship rates, and true net worth of the top creators on the internet.
Creators.proprietaryAlgorithm: Estimates are calculated using Infloura's proprietary {niche} algorithm. Real numbers vary by sponsorships and merch.
Creators.wantNumbersDesc: Calculate your own channel's exact value, forecast your growth, and learn how to price your sponsorships professionally.
Creators.funnelText: Want to see your own name on this list?

mrbeast.bio: Jimmy Donaldson, better known as MrBeast, is the most subscribed individual on YouTube. Known for his high-budget stunts, massive philanthropic giveaways, and pioneering the modern fast-paced editing style. While his RPM (Revenue Per Mille) in the entertainment niche is relatively low (est. $3-$5), his sheer volume of billions of monthly views generates astronomical ad revenue, the vast majority of which is reinvested directly back into future videos.

marques-brownlee.bio: Marques Brownlee, also known as MKBHD, is the premier tech reviewer on YouTube. With over 15 years in the game, he has built a reputation for high-quality production, deep technical insights, and unbiased reviews. His audience consists of high-intent tech buyers, leading to a premium RPM (est. $12-$18) from tech-focused advertisers.

emma-chamberlain.bio: Emma Chamberlain redefined the 'vlogger' genre with her raw, unfiltered editing style and relatable personality. She has since transitioned into a high-fashion icon and business owner (Chamberlain Coffee). Her lifestyle niche and high prestige brand partnerships command elite sponsorship rates far beyond standard ad revenue.

items.name: Sarah Jenkins
items.content: The math engine completely changed how I look at my business. I stopped guessing and started executing the custom AI roadmap. Hit $10k/mo in 4 months.

items.name: Marcus Wright
items.content: I always struggled with consistency. The 12-month projections showed me exactly what would happen if I just stuck to my upload schedule. Incredible tool.

items.name: Elena Rodriguez
items.content: Infloura is like having a CFO and Strategy Lead in your pocket. The Growth Tracking feature instantly tells me if my Reels strategy is actually working.

items.name: David Chen
items.content: The simulations are scarily accurate. It predicted my revenue dip in Q3 based on my engagement metrics, letting me pivot my content strategy just in time.

items.name: Jessica Fox
items.content: Finally, a tool that respects the business side of being a creator. The AI insights alone are worth 10x the monthly subscription.

items.name: Tom Barker
items.content: If you are serious about making a living from your content, you need this dashboard. Period. It's the ultimate reality check and action plan combined.
